name: FeelWorld T7 Plus Camera Monitor
description: Upgrade your on-camera viewing experience while shooting in the field to a Full HD monitor with the lightweight FeelWorld T7 Plus, a lightweight 7" IPS monitor outfitted with simultaneous vectorscope, histogram, and both audio phase and level monitoring.

features.Key Features:: 7" 1920 x 1200 Display | 4K HDMI In and Out | Wide 160° Viewing Angle | 1200:1 Contrast, 450 cd/m² Brightness | Built-In Waveform Monitoring | Mini Hot Shoe Mount | Two 1/4"-20 Threads | F970 Battery Plate | Included Sunshade
